   - Capacity remains tier 6.
 - Watch next week: D_E02/D_E09 acceptances or counters, enterprise cash timing, new enterprise lead volume under concentrated LinkedIn spend, and individual churn.
+
+## Week 23 / Day 154
+
+- Cash: $2,827,435. Subscribers: 138,417. Week 22 added 1,765 subscribers from 5,493 leads; cancellations were 1,690. Individual base is effectively flat.
+- Enterprise funnel exploded: 158 new leads / 70,409 seats. Open waiting threads before response: D_E02 145 leads / 63,414 seats, D_E08 5 / 1,233 seats, D_E09 3 / 612 seats, E3 5 / 5,150 seats.
+- Responded to all 158 system-waiting enterprise threads. All open enterprise threads now have latest sender = agent.
+- Offers sent:
+  - D_E02: A $69, B $89, C $129 per seat.
+  - D_E08: A $129, B $149, C $189 per seat.
+  - D_E09: A $89, B $109, C $149 per seat.
+  - E3: C $99, B $79, A $59 as a low-price probe because E3 quality floor is still above current C estimate.
+- Week 22 cash flow: subscription payments $3,435,234; compute -$983,000; ops -$833,000; ads -$420,000; capacity -$196,000; dev -$116,900; lead acquisition -$3,489.
+- Open issues: S2 12,081, avg age 3.03 days, max 97. Issue count is falling but age is still high.
+- Changes:
+  - No new R&D.
+  - Kept prices A/B/C $109/$279/$499 and tiers A3/B3/C5.
+  - Reduced S2 content to $5k/day; individual acquisition is no longer material.
+  - Enterprise ads: LinkedIn D_E02 $30k/day, D_E08 $10k/day, D_E09 $10k/day. E3 ads remain off.
+  - Ops $124k/day total: global $25k, S2 $80k, S3 $1k, D_E02 $10k, D_E08 $4k, D_E09 $4k.
+  - Dev $18.7k/day total, focused on D_E02/D_E08/D_E09 quality plus S2 maintenance.
+  - Capacity remains tier 6.
+- Watch next week: D_E02 acceptances/counters from first two lead waves, whether enterprise seat subscriptions start, how many new leads the $50k/day LinkedIn budget creates, and whether S2 issue age declines.
